title: diphasiastrum × issleri
intro: Diphasiastrum × issleri, also known as the Issler's fir clubmoss, is a rare hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between the Lycopodium annotinum and Diphasium isophyllum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Diphasiastrum × issleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the fronds, which can then be used in teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
